_comment: ComfyUI API-format background-removal graph (FIX-plugin-comfy-workflows §4). Uses an RMBG custom node (ComfyUI-RMBG / BRIA RMBG) to produce a transparent-background PNG. CUSTOM NODE — the service probes hasNode('RMBG') (and falls back name variants) first and returns a clear 'not installed' message otherwise. <<source_image>> from /upload/image. SaveImage writes RGBA PNG.
